China Payroll Content Pipeline: Setup Complete

Executive summary

  • The daily EOR-focused content pipeline is now set up in this repository.
  • Future posts will prioritize employer decision relevance for China hiring and payroll compliance.
  • Each post will output HTML plus image prompt assets for manual high-quality image generation.

What changed

The project now includes a structured workflow with a publishing script, HTML template, and prompt pack generation.

Why it matters for foreign employers

This helps teams publish consistent, factual, and readable updates for decision-makers evaluating China hiring models.

What to do now

  • Run daily research and drafting process.
  • Review draft quality and factual citations.
  • Publish using the automated script.

FAQ

Is this legal advice?

No. Informational only.

Can we replace images manually?

Yes. Use generated `image_prompt.txt` in your preferred image model and replace the final asset manually.

Need local employment support in China?

If you need a compliance-first Employer of Record (EOR) partner for hiring, payroll, and risk controls in China, China-Payroll.com can help your team evaluate the right setup.

Informational content only. This article does not constitute legal advice. Last reviewed: 2026-02-23.
